title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 365.125 - Rates, parties may agree to a rate, restrictions
text:
365.125.  Rates, parties may agree to a rate, restrictions. — As an alternative to the time price differential authorized by section 365.120, the parties may agree to any rate or amount of time price differential not exceeding a rate or amount authorized by section 408.450, but any such agreement shall be subject to the restrictions and conditions of sections 408.450 to 408.467.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1170)
